title: Zirtran's Anchor (article)
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref}}
{{Youmay|the RPG article|the [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|space station]] of the same name}}
{{MagazineArticle
|image=[[File:ZirtransAnchorTitle-Journal5.jpg]]
|title="Zirtran's Anchor"
|author=[[Tony Russo|Anthony P. Russo]]
|illustrator=
|editor=
|publisher=[[West End Games]]
|release date=[[February]] [[1995]]<ref name="Parent release date">[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]]</ref>

"'''Zirtran's Anchor'''" is an article by [[Tony Russo|Anthony Russo]] published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]] for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] which described the spacestation, [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|Zirtran's Anchor]].

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]]
